title: CobDok — COBOL programs using DBM.MODUL in the COBDOK documentation database
originalTitle: CobDok — programmer som bruker DBM.MODUL i COBDOK-databasen
analysisNote: In DB2/COBDOK the module registry table is DBM.MODUL (singular), not DBM.MODULES. These programs were found by scanning C:\opt\data\VisualCobol\Sources\cbl for SQL referencing DBM.MODUL (excluding DBM.MODUL_LINJER). Primary loader: DOHSCAN.

entries.descriptionNorwegian: Scanner COBOL-kilde og laster COBDOK (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE mot DBM.MODUL bl.a.)
entries.description: Scans COBOL sources and loads COBDOK — inserts/updates/deletes DBM.MODUL among other catalog tables

entries.descriptionNorwegian: Kontroll / uttrekk med join mot DBM.MODUL
entries.description: COBDOK check program — queries joining DBM.MODUL

entries.descriptionNorwegian: Bygg/uttrekk fra DBM.MODUL og relaterte tabeller
entries.description: COBDOK build/report — heavy use of DBM.MODUL joins
